name: Sunflower Dec Pillow Oblong Ivory/Melon Pink/Gold/Green - Threshold™: Cotton Voile, Indoor Use, Floral Design
description:
Bring the gorgeous beauty of the outdoors into your home with this Sunflower Decorative Oblong Pillow from Threshold™. This decorative oblong pillow features allover sunflower print with a printed reverse for a charming look that blends effortlessly with any decor style. Defined by its oblong shape, the decorative pillow has a soft cotton shell with a soft polyester filled interior to provide comfortable support as you lean back after a tiring day.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
